create table admin_actions (performed_at timestamp(6) not null, admin_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, target_user_id uuid, ip_address varchar(45), action_type varchar(255) not null check (action_type in ('BAN_USER','UNBAN_USER','DELETE_USER','DELETE_MESSAGE','DELETE_CHATROOM','REMOVE_MEMBER','DEACTIVATE_USER','LCK_CHATROOM','UNLOCK_CHATROOM')), metadata TEXT, reason TEXT, primary key (id))

create table audit_logs (timestamp timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, resource_id uuid, user_id uuid, action varchar(255) not null, details_json TEXT, event_type varchar(255) not null, ip_address varchar(255), resource_type varchar(255), user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id))

create table chat_room_members (is_active boolean not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, last_activity timestamp(6), last_read_at timestamp(6), left_at timestamp(6), chat_room_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, removed_by uuid, user_id uuid not null, role varchar(255), primary key (id), constraint UKpal8hkw0sfg71i5v05l0ojhq1 unique (chat_room_id, user_id))

create table chat_rooms (is_private boolean not null, max_participants integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), created_by uuid not null, deleted_by uuid, id uuid not null, name varchar(100) not null, description varchar(500), primary key (id))

create table file_permissions (granted_at timestamp(6) not null, file_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, permission_type varchar(255) not null check (permission_type in ('READ','WRITE','DELETE')), primary key (id))

create table files (is_public boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), file_size bigint not null, uploaded_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_by uuid, id uuid not null, uploader_id uuid not null, file_path varchar(500) not null, filename varchar(255) not null, mime_type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id))

create table message_audit_logs (performed_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, message_id uuid not null, performer_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(45), action varchar(255) not null check (action in ('CREATE','UPDATE','DELETE','RESTORE')), content TEXT, old_content TEXT, reason TEXT, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id))

create table messages (is_deleted boolean not null, is_edited boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), edited_at timestamp(6), timestamp timestamp(6) not null, chat_room_id uuid not null, deleted_by uuid, file_id uuid unique, id uuid not null, sender_id uuid not null, username varchar(50) not null, content varchar(5000) not null, message_type varchar(255) not null check (message_type in ('TEXT','IMAGE','FILE')), primary key (id))
create table orders (orderid integer generated by default as identity, quantity integer not null, unitprice float(53) not null, productname varchar(255), primary key (orderid))

create table refresh_tokens (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, last_used_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(45), token varchar(512) not null unique, user_agent varchar(512), primary key (id))
create table user_roles (user_id uuid not null, roles varchar(255) check (roles in ('ROLE_USER','ROLE_ADMIN')))

create table users (is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deactivated_at timestamp(6), last_login timestamp(6), deactivated_by uuid, id uuid not null, status varchar(20) check (status in ('ONLINE','OFFLINE','AWAY')), avatar_url varchar(500), bio TEXT, deactivation_reason TEXT, email varchar(255) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id))

create table admin_actions (performed_at timestamp(6) not null, admin_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, target_user_id uuid, ip_address varchar(45), action_type varchar(255) not null check (action_type in ('BAN_USER','UNBAN_USER','DELETE_USER','DELETE_MESSAGE','DELETE_CHATROOM','REMOVE_MEMBER','DEACTIVATE_USER','LCK_CHATROOM','UNLOCK_CHATROOM')), metadata TEXT, reason TEXT, primary key (id))

create table audit_logs (timestamp timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, resource_id uuid, user_id uuid, action varchar(255) not null, details_json TEXT, event_type varchar(255) not null, ip_address varchar(255), resource_type varchar(255), user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id))

create table chat_room_members (is_active boolean not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, last_activity timestamp(6), last_read_at timestamp(6), left_at timestamp(6), chat_room_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, removed_by uuid, user_id uuid not null, role varchar(255), primary key (id), constraint UKpal8hkw0sfg71i5v05l0ojhq1 unique (chat_room_id, user_id))

create table chat_rooms (is_private boolean not null, max_participants integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), created_by uuid not null, deleted_by uuid, id uuid not null, name varchar(100) not null, description varchar(500), primary key (id))

create table file_permissions (granted_at timestamp(6) not null, file_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, permission_type varchar(255) not null check (permission_type in ('READ','WRITE','DELETE')), primary key (id))

create table files (is_public boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), file_size bigint not null, uploaded_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_by uuid, id uuid not null, uploader_id uuid not null, file_path varchar(500) not null, filename varchar(255) not null, mime_type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id))

create table message_audit_logs (performed_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, message_id uuid not null, performer_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(45), action varchar(255) not null check (action in ('CREATE','UPDATE','DELETE','RESTORE')), content TEXT, old_content TEXT, reason TEXT, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id))

create table messages (is_deleted boolean not null, is_edited boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), edited_at timestamp(6), timestamp timestamp(6) not null, chat_room_id uuid not null, deleted_by uuid, file_id uuid unique, id uuid not null, sender_id uuid not null, username varchar(50) not null, content varchar(5000) not null, message_type varchar(255) not null check (message_type in ('TEXT','IMAGE','FILE')), primary key (id))
create table orders (orderid integer generated by default as identity, quantity integer not null, unitprice float(53) not null, productname varchar(255), primary key (orderid))

create table refresh_tokens (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, last_used_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(45), token varchar(512) not null unique, user_agent varchar(512), primary key (id))
create table user_roles (user_id uuid not null, roles varchar(255) check (roles in ('ROLE_USER','ROLE_ADMIN')))

create table users (is_active boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deactivated_at timestamp(6), last_login timestamp(6), deactivated_by uuid, id uuid not null, status varchar(20) check (status in ('ONLINE','OFFLINE','AWAY')), avatar_url varchar(500), bio TEXT, deactivation_reason TEXT, email varchar(255) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id))

create table admin_actions (performed_at timestamp(6) not null, admin_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, target_user_id uuid, ip_address varchar(45), action_type varchar(255) not null check (action_type in ('BAN_USER','UNBAN_USER','DELETE_USER','DELETE_MESSAGE','DELETE_CHATROOM','REMOVE_MEMBER','DEACTIVATE_USER','LCK_CHATROOM','UNLOCK_CHATROOM')), metadata TEXT, reason TEXT, primary key (id))

create table audit_logs (timestamp timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, resource_id uuid, user_id uuid, action varchar(255) not null, details_json TEXT, event_type varchar(255) not null, ip_address varchar(255), resource_type varchar(255), user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id))

create table chat_room_members (is_active boolean not null, joined_at timestamp(6) not null, last_activity timestamp(6), last_read_at timestamp(6), left_at timestamp(6), chat_room_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, removed_by uuid, user_id uuid not null, role varchar(255), primary key (id), constraint UKpal8hkw0sfg71i5v05l0ojhq1 unique (chat_room_id, user_id))

create table file_permissions (granted_at timestamp(6) not null, file_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, permission_type varchar(255) not null check (permission_type in ('READ','WRITE','DELETE')), primary key (id))

create table files (is_public boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), file_size bigint not null, uploaded_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_by uuid, id uuid not null, uploader_id uuid not null, file_path varchar(500) not null, filename varchar(255) not null, mime_type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id))

create table message_audit_logs (performed_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, message_id uuid not null, performer_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(45), action varchar(255) not null check (action in ('CREATE','UPDATE','DELETE','RESTORE')), content TEXT, old_content TEXT, reason TEXT, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id))

create table messages (is_deleted boolean not null, is_edited boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), edited_at timestamp(6), timestamp timestamp(6) not null, chat_room_id uuid not null, deleted_by uuid, file_id uuid unique, id uuid not null, sender_id uuid not null, username varchar(50) not null, content varchar(5000) not null, message_type varchar(255) not null check (message_type in ('TEXT','IMAGE','FILE')), primary key (id))
create table orders (orderid integer generated by default as identity, quantity integer not null, unitprice float(53) not null, productname varchar(255), primary key (orderid))

create table refresh_tokens (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, last_used_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, ip_address varchar(45), token varchar(512) not null unique, user_agent varchar(512), primary key (id))
create table user_roles (user_id uuid not null, roles varchar(255) check (roles in ('ROLE_USER','ROLE_ADMIN')))
